tasks.label: Start Docker Desktop
tasks.command: Start-Process 'C:\Program Files\Docker\Docker\Docker Desktop.exe'; Start-Sleep -Seconds 30; docker ps

tasks.label: Verify Deployment
tasks.command: docker cp da-macae-backend:/app/v1/orchestration/orchestration_manager.py c:\git_claude\da-macae\deployed_check.py && findstr /C:"_llm_chat_completion" c:\git_claude\da-macae\deployed_check.py | find /C /V ""

tasks.label: Verify Deployment 2
tasks.command: docker cp da-macae-backend:/app/v1/orchestration/orchestration_manager.py c:\git_claude\da-macae\deployed_check.py; Select-String '_llm_chat_completion' c:\git_claude\da-macae\deployed_check.py | Measure-Object | ForEach-Object { Write-Host ('MATCH_COUNT: ' + $_.Count) }

tasks.label: Docker Rebuild Backend
tasks.command: docker compose build --no-cache backend; docker compose up -d --force-recreate backend; Start-Sleep 30; Write-Host 'BUILD_DONE'
